description: One player choice / button in a dialogue window. Fixed-size, always 136 bytes.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Option ID, used to reference this choice from other windows.

fields.name: namechar
fields.description: Button label text, UTF-16LE fixed 64-character array.

fields.name: id_next
fields.description: Window ID to navigate to when this option is chosen (0 = close dialogue).
